name: Close Window
desc: Player closes an inventory window (chest, crafting table, etc).

fields.name: windowId
fields.desc: The window ID being closed (0 for player inventory)

implementation.overview: Sent when player closes a GUI window. Carries windowId. Modules: ChestStealer (delay close to finish steal), InvManager.

modules.name: ChestStealer delay
modules.purpose: Delay sending C0D until inventory is fully stolen.
